q: What's the best view that you have ever enjoyed?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi yêu cầu bạn kể về một trải nghiệm trong quá khứ. Hãy chọn một địa điểm thực sự ấn tượng (ví dụ: đỉnh núi, vịnh biển, hoặc thành phố về đêm). Sử dụng các tính từ chỉ mức độ cực hạn (superlative adjectives) và các cụm từ diễn tả sự kinh ngạc. Quan tâm đến việc mô tả không gian (vừa rộng lớn, vừa yên tĩnh) để tăng tính truyền cảm.

band7.text: The best view I’ve ever experienced was from the top of a mountain in Sapa. Standing above the clouds and looking down at the green valleys was absolutely amazing. It was a bit cold there, but the scenery made everything worth it.
band7.note: Trả lời mạch lạc, có địa điểm cụ thể và mô tả cảm xúc cá nhân. Sử dụng tốt tính từ 'absolutely amazing'.

band8.text: The most memorable vista I’ve ever witnessed was definitely the sunrise over Ha Long Bay. I was on a cruise ship, and watching the sun slowly peek behind the limestone karsts, reflecting on the emerald water, was truly breathtaking. It felt like something straight out of a painting, and the sheer serenity of the moment is something I’ll cherish forever.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng miêu tả rất tốt (vista, limestone karsts, emerald water, breathtaking, serenity). Có sự so sánh hình ảnh sinh động.

band9.text: Without question, the most awe-inspiring sight I’ve ever beheld was the sunrise at the summit of Mount Fuji. After a gruelling overnight climb, the rewarding spectacle of the sun breaking through a sea of clouds was nothing short of miraculous. The horizon was painted in vibrant hues of crimson and gold, and for a few fleeting moments, the world felt infinitely vast yet incredibly peaceful. It was a profound spiritual experience that left an indelible mark on my memory.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở mức độ chuyên gia (awe-inspiring, beheld, summit, gruelling, spectacle, miraculous, hues, fleeting, indelible mark). Cách kể chuyện đầy cảm xúc và triết lý.

v.meaning: khiến người ta kinh ngạc/ngưỡng mộ
v.example: The Milky Way is an awe-inspiring sight on a clear night.

v.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng/nhìn ngắm (quá khứ của behold)
v.example: We beheld a scene of incredible beauty.
It took us six hours to reach the summit.
The marathon was a gruelling test of endurance.
The solar eclipse was a magnificent spectacle.
Her survival was nothing short of a miracle.

v.meaning: những sắc thái màu rực rỡ
v.example: Transitioning clouds displayed vibrant hues of pink and orange.
I only caught a fleeting moment of the shooting star.

v.meaning: dấu ấn không thể phai mờ
v.example: The war left an indelible mark on his character.
Ha Long Bay is famous for its towering limestone karsts.

v.meaning: nước màu xanh ngọc lục bảo
v.example: The tropical island is surrounded by emerald water.
The view from the penthouse was breathtaking.
I love the serenity of the lake in the early morning.
I will cherish these childhood memories forever.
The balcony offers a broad vista of the city below.
The hotel has a panoramic restaurant on the 50th floor.
The coral reefs are stunningly beautiful.
The palace is a magnificent example of architecture.
The music was so beautiful it was almost sublime.

v.meaning: không thuộc về thế giới này/siêu thực
v.example: The landscape of Iceland feels almost otherworldly.
The rugged mountains of Scotland are perfect for hiking.
The Alps are famous for their snow-capped peaks.

v.meaning: thác nước chảy xuống mạnh mẽ
v.example: We stopped to admire the cascading waterfall.
The dazzling light of the sun on the snow was blinding.
It was a picturesque village with narrow cobblestone streets.
Santorini is known for its spectacular sunsets.
The Tuscan landscape is characterized by rolling hills.
We hiked through the dense forest for hours.
Lake Baikal is a famous crystal-clear lake in Russia.
The Maldives are home to many pristine beaches.
The castle looked mysterious in the misty valley.
The vast extent of the Sahara desert was overwhelming.
Standing on the ship, I saw only the boundless horizon.

v.meaning: đẹp đến mức trợn mắt (ngoạn mục)
v.example: The special effects in the movie were truly eye-popping.

v.meaning: làm ai đó nín thở (vì quá đẹp/bất ngờ)
v.example: The view from the Eiffel tower will take your breath away.

v.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt
v.example: The flower show was a real feast for the eyes.

v.meaning: như bước ra từ phim ảnh
v.example: This scenery is so perfect it's like straight out of a movie.
The whole holiday felt like a dream.

v.meaning: khiến ai đó không nói nên lời
v.example: The beauty of the cathedral left us speechless.

v.meaning: không thể diễn tả bằng lời
v.example: The kindness she showed was beyond words.
Seeing an aurora is a once in a lifetime experience.
Our wedding day is an unforgettable memory for both of us.
Nature has a way to soothe the soul.
Some hikers find a spiritual connection with the mountains.

v.meaning: trốn khỏi cuộc sống thành phố
v.example: I need a weekend trip to escape the city life.
Camping is a great way to immerse yourself in nature.

v.meaning: quay lại với những giá trị cơ bản
v.example: Life in the countryside is all about getting back to basics.

v.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
v.example: Reaching the peak gives a huge sense of accomplishment.

v.meaning: một sự thay đổi sảng khoái
v.example: The fresh mountain air was a refreshing change from the smog.
The overwhelming beauty of the stars left me in awe.
